title: T-024 — UI: P1 modals batch (RPT-014 error_log, RPT-015 refresh_confirm, RPT-017 delete_confirm, RPT-019 p2_toast, RPT-020 access_denied) (12-REPORTING §15.1a)
prompt:
# T-024 — P1 reporting modals batch

PRD: docs/prd/12-REPORTING-PRD.md §15.1a RPT-014 / RPT-015 / RPT-017 / RPT-019 / RPT-020
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototypes:
- RPT-014 error_log_modal: modals.jsx:306-329
- RPT-015 refresh_confirm_modal: modals.jsx:381-400
- RPT-017 delete_confirm_modal: modals.jsx:285-303
- RPT-019 p2_toast_modal: modals.jsx:453-464
- RPT-020 access_denied_modal: modals.jsx:467-481

## Goal
Five shadcn Dialog-based modal components for the P1 surface set. Each is a client component with controlled open/close + Server Action integration where applicable. BL-PROD-05 fix (btn-danger → Button variant='destructive') applied here.

## Prototype parity (per modal)
- **RPT-014 error_log** (read-only): export_id + dashboard + format + attempted_at + error_code + full error message in ScrollArea + 'Suggested Action' from export_error_codes ref table + Retry Export button (idempotency key).
- **RPT-015 refresh_confirm**: non-destructive confirm; Server Action calls `app.refresh_reporting_mv(view_name)` (T-005); view name enum-bound; useTransition for pending; success toast (Sonner) with duration_ms.
- **RPT-017 delete_confirm**: destructive variant; Button variant='destructive' (fixes BL-PROD-05); audit log INSERT on confirm (non-negotiable compliance); kind prop drives copy variant; on confirm cancels Trigger.dev job if kind='schedule'.
- **RPT-019 p2_toast**: info dialog when P2 dashboard card clicked (RPT-HOME); body driven by dashboards_catalog.feature_flag; single CTA 'Got it'.
- **RPT-020 access_denied**: inline action denied; logs `inline_denied` row to report_access_audits (distinct from middleware deny); single CTA 'Close'.

## Implementation contract
1. Each modal in `apps/web/components/reporting/modals/<name>-modal.tsx` ('use client') with controlled open prop + onClose callback.
2. Use packages/ui shadcn Dialog (no @radix-ui/react-dialog import outside packages/ui per ESLint rule).
3. RPT-015: Server Action `triggerMvRefresh(viewName)` returns `{duration_ms, status}`; uses T-005 helper; permission `rpt.mv.refresh`.
4. RPT-017: Server Action `deleteEntity({kind, id})` performs soft-delete for scheduled_reports + recipient_groups, hard-delete for presets and unshared custom_reports; writes audit_log row.
5. RPT-019: reads dashboard metadata from dashboards_catalog; CTA closes.
6. RPT-020: writes report_access_audits row with action='inline_denied'.
7. All labels via next-intl `reporting.modals.*`.
8. RTL test per modal asserting: open/close + Server Action invocation + audit row written + destructive styling (Button variant='destructive') for delete.

## Files
- apps/web/components/reporting/modals/error-log-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/components/reporting/modals/refresh-confirm-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/components/reporting/modals/delete-confirm-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/components/reporting/modals/p2-toast-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/components/reporting/modals/access-denied-modal.tsx [create]
- packages/reporting/src/actions/trigger-mv-refresh.ts [create]
- packages/reporting/src/actions/delete-entity.ts [create]
- apps/web/components/reporting/modals/__tests__/*.test.tsx [create per modal]
- apps/web/messages/{en,pl}/reporting-modals.json [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given each modal renders, when compared to its prototype line range, then visual + structural parity verified by RTL snapshot + Playwright per modal (5 separate parity checks).
2. Given delete_confirm fires onConfirm, when Server Action runs, then audit_log row is INSERTed AND (for kind='schedule') any pending Trigger.dev job is cancelled.
3. Given delete_confirm renders, when Button is inspected, then `Button variant='destructive'` is used (fixes BL-PROD-05; never `btn-danger` CSS class).
4. Given refresh_confirm fires onConfirm with viewName='mv_yield_by_line_week', when Server Action runs, then it calls `app.refresh_reporting_mv` (T-005 helper) and returns duration_ms; pending state disables both buttons via useTransition.
5. Given refresh_confirm is invoked with viewName='evil_sql', when validated, then it rejects at type level (enum) AND at runtime (helper rejects unknown name) — defense in depth.
6. Given access_denied modal is shown, when Close is clicked, then a report_access_audits row with action='inline_denied' is written.
7. UI parity for all 5 modals + next-intl wrapping verified.

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: 5 RTL test files asserting parity + Server Action invocation + audit row writes + destructive styling.
- Playwright parity for each modal triggered from a parent page (use RPT-EXPORTS / RPT-SETTINGS / RPT-HOME as triggers).
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web test reporting/modals && pnpm --filter @monopilot/web playwright test reporting-modals`.
- GREEN: build 5 modals + 2 Server Actions.

## Risk red lines
- Do not bypass packages/ui shadcn Dialog — direct radix import forbidden (ESLint rule §0).
- Do not skip audit_log INSERT in delete confirm — compliance non-negotiable.
- Do not use `btn-danger` class — fix BL-PROD-05 by using Button variant='destructive'.
- Do not let refresh confirm accept arbitrary view name — enum-bound, defense in depth.
- Do not skip next-intl wrapping.
- Do not skip Playwright parity per modal.
- Do not allow P2 modal CTA to navigate anywhere — close only (per RPT-019 spec).

pipeline_inputs.description: Five P1 reporting modals: error_log, refresh_confirm, delete_confirm, p2_toast, access_denied. BL-PROD-05 fix included. Two Server Actions wired.
pipeline_inputs.details: Each modal renders via packages/ui shadcn Dialog. Delete writes audit_log + cancels Trigger.dev job if schedule. Refresh uses T-005 enum-bound helper. Access-denied writes inline_denied audit.
